title: salix subsericea
intro: Salix subsericea, also known as silky willow, is a species of willow tree that belongs to the Salicaceae family. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of salicylic acid. The silky willow is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and menstrual cramps. In traditional herbal medicine, Salix subsericea is often used in tea, tincture, or salve preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
